en.name: Labor Cost Calculator
en.seo_title: Labor Cost Calculator — Wages & Burden | CalcToWork
en.seo_description: Calculate total labor cost with benefits and overhead. Enter hours, rate and burden percentage. Free construction cost calculator.
en.example_label: Calcular consumo de agua para 8 operarios durante 60 dÃ­as en obra de reforma.

range_hints.tipo_obra: Tipo de obra segÃºn consumo: reforma (80 L/dÃ­a/op), obra nueva (120 L/dÃ­a/op), demoliciÃ³n (60 L/dÃ­a/op)

en.result_context: El coste estimado es de {m3_total} mÂ³. Considera aÃ±adir 10-15% para imprevistos.
steps: Enter the number of workers and hours worked
Calculate base labor cost: workers × hours × hourly rate
Add burden: typically 20–35% for payroll taxes, insurance, benefits
Add overhead allocation: tools, supervision, site facilities
Total labor cost = base + burden + overhead
mistakes: Using only the hourly wage — the true cost is 1.3–1.5× the wage
Not accounting for overtime rates — time-and-a-half or double time
Forgetting travel time, setup, and cleanup — these are paid hours too
en.description: Calculate total labor costs including wages, benefits, insurance, and overhead. Enter hours and rates for accurate labor cost estimates.
en.rc: The total labor cost is {coste_total}€ comprising {coste_base}€ base wages plus {coste_cargas}€ in burden and overhead.
en.fd: Total labor = workers × hours × rate × (1 + burden%)
en.el: Labor cost for 3 workers, 40 hours each, at 18€/hour with 30% burden
